name: Amylyx Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: Amylyx Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company developing novel therapies for endocrine and neurodegenerative diseases. It is currently developing four investigational therapies: avexitide for post-bariatric hypoglycemia (PBH), AMX0035 for Wolfram syndrome, AMX0114 for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), and AMX0318 for PBH and other rare diseases. The company previously marketed RELYVRIO/ALBRIOZA for ALS but voluntarily discontinued marketing in 2024.

exposures.sentence: We are currently developing four investigational therapies for potential impact across several diseases: avexitide in PBH, AMX0035 in Wolfram syndrome, AMX0114 in ALS, and AMX0318 in PBH and other rare diseases.

catalysts.event: Last patient randomized and dosed in Phase 3 LUCIDITY trial for avexitide
catalysts.sentence: We continue to expect to randomize and dose the last eligible patients in Q1 2026 with topline data expected in Q3 2026, and if approved, a commercial launch in 2027.

catalysts.event: Topline data from Phase 3 LUCIDITY trial for avexitide
catalysts.sentence: We continue to expect to randomize and dose the last eligible patients in Q1 2026 with topline data expected in Q3 2026, and if approved, a commercial launch in 2027.

catalysts.event: Potential commercial launch of avexitide for PBH
catalysts.sentence: We continue to expect to randomize and dose the last eligible patients in Q1 2026 with topline data expected in Q3 2026, and if approved, a commercial launch in 2027.
continue our preclinical efforts of AMX0318, including advancing into IND-enabling studies in 2026
